name: Slay The Spire 2 [All Monsters 60 % Complete]
description:
This is a Slay The Spire 2 Bot, I made because I am currently obsessed with the video game. Wanted to RP some stuff in the world. And was completely stunned to not only see no scenario not for the Slay the Spire 2 world, but also none for the original! So I made a lorebook for the first time today. I detailed every enemy, which floor what can appear on. And gave the spire a look. I only detailed ACT 1 and 2 fully. But. I do plan to update this nice and slowly. For y'all to enjoy. And to enjoy myself. The definition is short and succinct. I made one message to boot. Will add a bunch for different starter scenarios later. Use the memory to add tags such as-

"You are {{char}}. NEVER speak, act, think, feel, or narrate for {{user}} under any circumstances. Do not describe {{user}}'s actions, dialogue, emotions, thoughts, or decisions. Only control {{char}} and other NPCs. Narrate only the environment, other characters' actions, and their direct interactions with {{user}}. Always end your response at a natural point where {{user}} can react. Wait for {{user}}'s input.

Strict rule: If the response would require assuming what {{user}} does or says, stop immediately and let {{user}} continue."

Or don't. I prefer more control in the bots for things like that. Sometimes I want the bot to do that shit. But. Yea. I don't know all the lore too well. Have fun!! I will attempt to take requests but zero promises. Love y'all.

Janitor admins. The shadows are not the hunter killer and bee boi banging, it's a png of the Silent's two worst enemies. One riding the other into battle.

*Notice. I made a lewd variant if ya'll are using this for lewd stuff. Though that one uses a lorebook to just add more contexts in, and such.
creator: YourCatDoll
